kpi.prompt: Erwarteter Kassenbestand in 30 Tagen: aktueller Bankbestand plus offene Forderungen mit Fälligkeit in 30 Tagen minus offene Verbindlichkeiten mit Fälligkeit in 30 Tagen; ein einzelner Datensatz.
kpi.sql_string:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(bank_balance.current_bank_balance, 0)
    + COALESCE(open_receivables.receivables_due_30d, 0)
    - COALESCE(open_payables.payables_due_30d, 0),
    2
  ) AS expected_cash_position_30d
FROM (
  SELECT
    SUM(COALESCE(credit_amount, 0) - COALESCE(debit_amount, 0)) AS current_bank_balance
  FROM bank_statements
  WHERE is_completed = TRUE
) bank_balance
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN i.payment_status != 'completed'
         AND i.date <= DATEADD(day, 30, CURRENT_DATE)
        THEN COALESCE(i.target_amount, 0) - COALESCE(i.current_amount_paid, 0)
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS receivables_due_30d
  FROM invoices i
  WHERE i.payment_status != 'completed'
) open_receivables
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN c.payment_status != 'completed'
         AND c.date <= DATEADD(day, 30, CURRENT_DATE)
        THEN COALESCE(c.target_amount, 0) - COALESCE(c.current_amount_paid, 0)
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS payables_due_30d
  FROM credit_notes c
  WHERE c.payment_status != 'completed'
) open_payables;

en.title: Liquidity forecast 30 days
en.description: Expected cash balance in 30 days given open receivables, payables and recurring outflows.

de.title: Liquiditätsvorschau 30 Tage
de.description: Erwarteter Kassenbestand in 30 Tagen unter Berücksichtigung offener Forderungen, Verbindlichkeiten und wiederkehrender Abflüsse.
